title: Expected Returns Lifecycle
objective: Verify the ability to flag an expense, track it on dashboard/timeline, log partial/full refunds, and dismiss.

steps.step: Create a new expense for 100 EUR, Category 'Clothing', check 'Return Expected', and save.

steps.expected_result: Dashboard widget shows the pending return.
The new expense has an indicator for 'Return Expected'.

steps.step: From Dashboard widget, select the expense and choose 'Log Refund' -> 'Partial', enter 30 EUR.
steps.expected_result: UI creates a -30 EUR expense in 'Clothing'. The original item remains pending.

steps.step: Select the expense again and choose 'Dismiss'.
steps.expected_result: Return is dismissed. Dashboard widget removes the item.
The original 100 EUR expense no longer has the 'Return Expected' indicator.
